items.name_cn:
Size 24-14-5cm
A favorite small LV monogram crossbody bag perfect for shopping. Very practical with two straps, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Many people visit the counter but can't find it, and the small size is the hardest to get. Prices in China have risen again. This bag holds a lot: card holder, compact powder, lipstick, tissues, keys, and even a small power bank with ease. Features a magnetic snap and a small flat inner pocket.

items.name_cn:
Size: 16-19-6 cm
The hot-selling Utility Phone Pocket clutch has arrived. No need to doubt, we only make the best quality items! Details to follow. This bag is cut from Monogram canvas into a flexible shape, providing a place for your smartphone. A zippered pocket securely stores cards, cash, or keys. The adjustable canvas strap and metal chain are detachable, offering multiple carrying ways.

items.name_en: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. It features enlarged classic quilting and a chain strap design, retaining the classic while upgrading practicality and comfort! The name '19' comes from time, just like the 2.55, so you know it was born in 2019. It also covers Coco Chanel's birthday. Imported goatskin, fine and soft texture, feels fluffy when held.

items.name_cn:
Size: 17×16×7cm
CHANEL Overseas Channel Exclusive❗️ Calfskin Bucket Bag, CHANEL SS23 Bucket Bag. In addition to being more compact than the 22 model, the "gemstones" and logo pendants on the chain offer more refined details compared to the modern urban aesthetic, especially perfect for vacation and matching with solid colors or tonal looks.

items.name_cn:
Small
Tote latest Autumn/Winter Paris Map Series, I've been wanting this tote, it's here. It retains the simple bag shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. Can be carried by hand or crossbody, fully meeting daily travel needs. Classic animal embroidery, iconic letters, stylish and versatile with a full vintage vibe
size:26*12*21cm

items.name_cn: Small

specs.rawTitle: Small

items.name_cn:
Small
【Balenciaga】New Crush Tote 'Trash Bag', perfectly combining Trash and Crush elements, the wrinkled texture highlights the excellent touch, soft washed denim and sheep leather + silver aged hardware + drawstring closure + logo print, the actual product is lighter than the 22bag, cowhide is more durable than sheepskin, captures the essence of the 'trash bag' better than Chanel, a large capacity bucket bag, items can be easily thrown into the bag, the drawstring design is this year's trend, just pull to close the bag mouth, the chain design allows for hand, shoulder, or underarm, slip bag, and other carrying methods. Casual, unconstrained is the attitude this bag should have✔️
Model: BG0305, Large size: 39.8x45.9x13.9cm; Small size: 23.8x25.9x9.9cm.

items.name_cn:
Small
👄Dior New Toujours Handbag, this Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the 2023 Spring/Summer show. Its casual and practical design is unique, crafted from imported calfskin and finished with oversized woven quilting. The spacious interior compartment with a small pocket allows for neat storage of daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D rotary clasp, adjustable sides to enhance style, and a leather handle with adjustable details for easy carrying. CD Lock and strap closure with Dior charm, detachable inner pocket, adjustable leather handle, includes dust bag! Model: M1188s, Size: 23x15x15cm.

specs.rawTitle:
Small
